per_case_summary.description: Follow-up continuation after selecting a candidate document
Follow-up continuation with explicit next-step request
Continuation but model resets like a new task
Continuation where context phrase is omitted
Slot missing then user fills and flow resumes
Slot filling with explicit document id
Redundant ask even though slot already filled
Slot fill followed by normal continuation
Slot filling but response continuity is weak
Retry path succeeds after transient error
Reroute then continues with new owner
Reroute effective but later continuation resets
Explicit topic switch from document to runtime
Explicit topic switch to calendar-like request
Mixed flow: slot missing -> fill -> reroute -> continue
Mixed flow: retry ineffective then reroute
Mixed flow: continuation miss then recovery
Mixed flow: fail-close decision after unstable retries
